message:
✨ Add star treatment to KubeStellar logo across console (#2067)

Add a 4-pointed sparkle star with two flanking plus signs (purple gradient)
as an SVG overlay on the KubeStellar logo. Applied to:
- Main navbar logo (top-left)
- Tour trigger icon (top-right navbar)
- Tour tooltip header
- Login page logo
- ConsoleAIIcon component (used throughout)

New LogoWithStar component wraps the logo with the decorative SVG overlay.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
